productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girls Diane Pink Top
description: CompositionPink boat neck top made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, with right shoulder button panel, short sleeves, chest print in pearly effect with suede branding and an extra panel at the end of the length for a gathered FitFitRegular36 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Indulge your little one in happy feelings with this pink boat-neck tee from Levi's. The pearly "LEVI'S" lettering in suede on the chest coupled with a play-time print fills this tee with the playful spirit of wonder and happiness. Team this with small white skirts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
